mapper.sql: id, symbol, timeframe, kline_json, last_kline_time, update_time
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO asset_kline (symbol, timeframe, kline_json, last_kline_time, update_time) VALUES (#{symbol}, #{timeframe}, #{klineJson}, #{lastKlineTime}, #{updateTime})
mapper.update: UPDATE asset_kline SET symbol = #{symbol}, timeframe = #{timeframe}, kline_json = #{klineJson}, last_kline_time = #{lastKlineTime}, update_time = #{updateTime} WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO asset_kline (symbol, timeframe, kline_json, last_kline_time, update_time) VALUES (#{symbol}, #{timeframe}, #{klineJson}, #{lastKlineTime}, #{updateTime}) ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE kline_json = VALUES(kline_json), last_kline_time = VALUES(last_kline_time), update_time = VALUES(update_time)
